title: Gmail delivery monitor and focused model/source triage

visible_sent_plain_text_resend.subject: sunxi-mmc: A733 IDMAC stuck in descriptor rea
visible_sent_plain_text_resend.observation: The 18:01 message is visible in Gmail Sent with the intended recipients and body.

visible_bounces.reason: 550 Mailing lists do not accept HTML mail.

gmail_evidence.search_query: newer_than:1d ("Message blocked" OR "not delivered" OR rejected OR blocked OR mailer-daemon)
gmail_evidence.search_result: Gmail showed 6 results. The visible rejection results were the 17:40 HTML attempt and a draft/forward. No 18:01 plain-text resend bounce was visible.
gmail_evidence.interpretation: There is evidence the first HTML attempt was rejected by lists, and evidence the later plain-text resend exists in Sent. There is no visible Gmail evidence that the 18:01 resend bounced. This does not prove list archive distribution or maintainer receipt.

public_archive_check.result: No public archive hit for the sent thread. Search still mainly finds the known U-Boot A733 series and generic forum pages.

watch_only: IDMAC enable/write-posting delay or readback probe. This is cheap but model-derived only; do not boot-test without source or maintainer evidence.
rejected_or_duplicate: Descriptor visibility/coherency/address suggestions duplicate H009-H036 evidence.
dw_mmc/SDHCI suggestions are the wrong driver family for this A733 sunxi-mmc diagnostic path.
STORE/MBUS/MSI-lite clock ideas are already represented in the diagnostic DTS/driver and were tested without fixing descriptor fetch.

decision: No new behavior patch. Keep monitoring mail/list archives and continue source-backed audits only.
